skill.name: qwen-image-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs.
skill.summary: Professional image generation with superior text rendering capabilities via Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro
skill.author: tul-sh

security_audit.summary: All 56 static findings are false positives. The skill file contains only markdown documentation with code examples showing how to use the inference.sh CLI. The detected patterns (shell commands, URLs) appear in fenced code blocks as legitimate documentation examples. No executable code, prompt injection attempts, or malicious intent detected. Safe to publish.

low_findings.title: Documentation Code Blocks Contain Shell Commands
low_findings.description: The skill documentation contains shell command examples in fenced code blocks. These are markdown documentation examples showing users how to use the inference.sh CLI tool, not executable code. No security risk.

content.user_title: Generate Professional Images with Superior Text Rendering
content.value_statement: Create marketing materials, posters, and designs with accurate text using Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro. This skill solves the common problem of AI image generators struggling with text by using Alibaba's specialized model for professional text rendering.
actual_capabilities: Generate images with professional-grade text rendering including multi-line paragraphs and fine-grained detail
Create marketing materials with precise text placement using custom dimensions up to 2048x2048 pixels
Produce 1-6 image variations in a single generation with optional random seed for reproducibility
Edit existing images using reference images for style transfer and object manipulation
Apply negative prompts to avoid unwanted content like blurry or distorted text
Generate images with specific aspect ratios between 512x512 and 2048x2048 total pixels
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and API authentication which is separate from Claude Code
Maximum prompt length is 800 characters for the main prompt and 500 characters for negative prompts
Cannot generate images larger than 2048x2048 pixels total resolution
External API dependency means generation speed depends on inference.sh service availability
Only supports PNG format output for generated images
Requires separate inference.sh skill installation for full functionality

use_cases.title: Marketing Team Creates Campaign Visuals
use_cases.description: Marketing professionals generate banners and promotional materials with accurate company slogans and pricing text without manual design work.

use_cases.title: Event Promoter Designs Posters
use_cases.description: Event organizers create eye-catching posters with event details, dates, and headlines rendered correctly without hiring a graphic designer.

use_cases.title: Content Creator Generates Social Media Graphics
use_cases.description: Social media managers produce branded visuals with overlay text for posts, stories, and advertisements at scale.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image of a serene mountain landscape at sunrise with a lake reflection
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple text-to-image generation for landscapes, scenes, or objects

prompt_templates.title: Poster with Text
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster with the title "SUMMER FESTIVAL 2024" in large bold yellow letters at the top. Add "Live Music • Food • Fun" in smaller white text below. Use a vibrant sunset gradient background with palm tree silhouettes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Design event posters with specific text content, fonts, and styling

prompt_templates.title: Product Marketing Banner
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a professional e-commerce banner showing a luxury watch on a dark elegant surface. Add "TIMELESS ELEGANCE" in gold serif font at the top center. Include "50% OFF" in red at the bottom right. 1920x1080 dimensions.
prompt_templates.scenario: Create promotional marketing materials with product images and sales copy

prompt_templates.title: Image Style Transfer
prompt_templates.prompt: Edit the person in the first image to wear the red dress from the second image. Keep the face and pose the same but change only the clothing. Generate 2 variations.
prompt_templates.scenario: Modify existing images using reference images for clothing swaps or style changes

output_examples.input: Generate a poster with "GRAND OPENING" in large red text
output_examples.output: A vertical poster image displaying GRAND OPENING in bold red serif font centered on an elegant gold and white gradient background with professional design quality

output_examples.input: Create a 1920x1080 banner for summer sale with "50% OFF" in yellow
output_examples.output: A horizontal marketing banner with SUMMER SALE in large white text on a gradient sunset background, featuring 50% OFF in yellow text below with clean modern styling

output_examples.input: Generate 4 logo variations for a coffee shop called Bean & Brew
output_examples.output: Four different minimalist logo designs featuring coffee cups, beans, or steam elements with the text Bean & Brew in various typography styles and layouts

best_practices: Always wrap exact text content in quotes within your prompt for accurate rendering
Disable prompt_extend by setting it to false when you need precise control over text placement and styling
Use negative prompts like blurry text, distorted text, low quality to avoid common text rendering issues
Specify font details including color, style, size, and position for best text results
anti_patterns: Do not exceed the 800 character limit for prompts as this will cause generation failures
Avoid requesting text content without quotes as the model may interpret it as description rather than exact text to render
Do not set dimensions larger than 2048x2048 total pixels as the API will reject the request
Never include reference images from untrusted sources as this could expose the API to malicious URLs

faq.question: Do I need to install anything to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need the inference.sh CLI tool. Install it with npx skills add inference-sh/skills@agent-tools and authenticate with infsh login before generating images.

faq.question: Why is the text in my generated image blurry or incorrect?
faq.answer: Enable prompt_extend false for precise control and always wrap exact text in quotes. Add a negative prompt like blurry text, distorted text, low quality to improve text rendering quality.

faq.question: What is the maximum image size I can generate?
faq.answer: The total pixel dimensions must be between 512x512 and 2048x2048. You can use any aspect ratio within these bounds, such as 1920x1080 for banners or 1024x1536 for posters.

faq.question: Can I edit existing images with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, provide reference images as URLs in the reference_images array. The model can perform style transfers, clothing changes, and other edits using 1-3 input images.

faq.question: How do I get the same image result multiple times?
faq.answer: Use the seed parameter with an integer value between 0 and 2147483647. The same seed with identical prompt parameters will produce reproducible results.

faq.question: What is the difference between this and the standard Qwen-Image skill?
faq.answer: The Pro model specializes in professional text rendering with better multi-line text support, finer details, and stronger adherence to complex prompts. Use it for text-heavy designs like posters and marketing materials.
